achievements.description: Find all 5 pieces of equipment exclusive to Hard difficulty.

achievements.description: Complete Boss Rush in 6 minutes or less as Soma and obtain Excalibur.

achievements.description: Complete Boss Rush in 5 minutes or less as Soma and obtain the Positron Rifle.

achievements.title: The Sword of Many Slashes
achievements.description: Complete Boss Rush in 4 minutes or less as Soma and obtain Valmanway.

achievements.title: Party Like It's 1999
achievements.description: Return to Dracula's Castle and defeat the heir apparent in Julius Mode.

achievements.title: Belmont Legend
achievements.description: Defeat every boss in Julius Mode on Hard difficulty.
achievements.author: SirVG

achievements.title: Are These New Sub-Weapons?
achievements.description: Complete Boss Rush in 6 minutes or less as Julius.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Sword or Whip?
achievements.description: Complete Boss Rush in 4 minutes or less as Julius.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Path of the Boneheaded
achievements.description: [No NG+ | Hard | Lv.<=2] Defeat the Creaking Skull boss without taking damage.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Path of the Deadeye
achievements.description: [No NG+ | Hard | Lv.<=6] Defeat the Manticore boss in 10 or fewer attacks using only Bullet Souls.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Path of the Minimalist
achievements.description: [No NG+ | Hard | Lv.<=10] Defeat the Great Armor boss without taking damage or utilizing souls.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Path of the Summoner
achievements.description: [No NG+ | Hard | Lv.<=13] Defeat the Big Golem boss without the use of physical attacks or Bullet Souls.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Path of the Hunter
achievements.description: [No NG+ | Hard | Lv.<=15] Defeat Headhunter without taking damage using only knives, daggers, and bows.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Path of the Calcium-Rich
achievements.description: [No NG+ | Hard | Lv.<=20] Defeat Death without taking damage using only spears and the souls of skeletal creatures.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Path of the Predecessor
achievements.description: [No NG+ | Hard | Lv.<=25] Defeat Legion without taking damage using only a whip and the souls of monsters from the first CV.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Path of the Pugilist
achievements.description: [No NG+ | Hard | Lv.<=30] Defeat Balore without taking damage using only fist-enhancing weapons and martial arts.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Path of the Warrior
achievements.description: [No NG+ | Hard | Lv.<=35] Defeat Graham without taking damage using only physical attacks.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Path of the Cremator
achievements.description: [No NG+ | Hard | Lv.<=40] Defeat Julius without taking damage using only katanas and fire-based attacks.
achievements.author: Infernox

achievements.title: Path of the Goetia
achievements.description: [NG+ OK | Hard | Lv.<=50] Defeat Chaos without taking damage using only pistols and the souls of demonic creatures.
achievements.author: Infernox
